title: CRITICAL: Historical Revenue mismatch in Q2 currency reports
description: Historical invoice conversions are applying current live exchange rates instead of archived rates stored in the database. Logs show billing service was called. Suspicious commit cf78a9c2 pushed recently. Tests failing.
expected_root_cause: Pre-2024 currency conversion uses live exchange rates instead of historical archive rates.

title: CRITICAL: Null pointer auth profile crash during token validation
description: Rare crash in token validation loop: AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'get' at auth/service.py:42. Affecting guest role users.
expected_root_cause: Session validation dereferences a missing user profile instead of rejecting the deleted user token cleanly.

title: CRITICAL: Dependency mismatch on JSON serialization
description: ImportError: cannot import name 'SafeJSONDecoder' from 'serialization.utils' causing container start failure. Incompatible dependency versions in requirements.txt.
expected_root_cause: The billing tax engine imports APIs that require a newer dependency version than the target application pins.
